nasb.text: All these were the cities of the sons of Merari according to their families, the rest of the families of the Levites; and their lot was twelve cities.

esv.text: As for the cities of the several Merarite clans, that is, the remainder of the clans of the Levites, those allotted to them were in all twelve cities.

cnv.text: 利未人其餘的家族，就是米拉利的子孫，按著家族抽籤所得的城，共有十二座。

ccb.text: 利未人中米拉利的子孙按宗族所分到的城邑共有十二座。
